title: dioscorea calcicola
intro: Dioscorea calcicola, also known as Chinese yam or wild yam, is a species of flowering plant in the family Dioscoreaceae. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Dioscorea calcicola include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and relieving menstrual cramps and other symptoms associated with PMS. Dioscorea calcicola can be prepared in various herbal forms, including dried roots, capsules, and tea, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
